title: Prepare v0.5.39 metadata from final candidate tree
rawUserRequest: 按已修正的候选分支 finalizer 流程准备 v0.5.39 发布候选：先在本工单纳入实测预算，再使用 finalize-release-freeze-candidate 基于候选分支最终树生成元数据；不发布 tag/provider release，不跳过计划工单。预算和格式检查必须是本工单硬门禁，不单独拆预算工单。

declaredIntent.summary: 将 v0.5.39 元数据绑定到包含本工单所有非元数据变更的候选分支最终树，为合并后关闭和最终默认分支生命周期投影做好准备。

outOfScope: Default-branch final lifecycle projection before closure
Adopter projects and installed runtime repositories

sources.reason: Candidate finalizer is the required source-bound generation path.
Release declaration to bind to candidate archive.
Measured budget policy that must be reserved before this archive.

riskAssessment.reason: Candidate metadata and one measured budget policy projection are source-bound and provider publication is excluded.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete candidate PR/merge/close workflow before publication.

preReviewWarnings: Verify candidate tree identity, measured budget, and no provider publication before closure.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Candidate release metadata is generated by finalize-release-freeze-candidate from this branch final tree.
release.json, release-state.json, release-digests, and release-freeze candidate projections agree.
Measured archiveGrowth=503 and pythonLines=39504 pass hard budget and format gates in this same Work Item.
The Work Item completes archive, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default sync without provider publication.
guidelines: Candidate metadata must be generated by the repository finalizer, not hand-edited.
Keep exact source/archive checks fail-closed and keep template metadata separate from adopter projects.
Budget and formatting checks are hard preflight gates; do not create a budget-only Work Item.

intent.problem: The previous metadata PR was generated before the final governance policy change, so its merged source tree invalidated the release archive identity.
constraints: Update the measured budget before archiving.
Generate metadata only after all non-metadata candidate changes are present.
Do not claim final closed lifecycle or publish from this candidate Work Item.
intent.rationale: Candidate mode removes the circular dependency by binding metadata to the complete candidate tree, while final closed lifecycle evidence is generated only after merge and ai-close-work-item.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/ai-close-work-item release workflow and publication after verification.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: Reserve the measured candidate release archive in the same functional release Work Item; no budget-only Work Item.
